sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6778" key="a)na/komma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνάκομμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀνακόπτω</etym>) <sense id="n6778.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">check,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φλεγμονῶν, ὀδυνῶν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg012:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.20</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
